name: Serverless

aliases.name: HttpApi
aliases.comment:
Program for an HTTP API.

A Serverless.Program is parameterized by your 3 custom types

* Config is a server load-time record of deployment specific values
* Model is for whatever you need during the processing of a request
* Msg is your app message type

You must provide the following:

* `configDecoder` decodes a JSON value for your custom config type
* `requestPort` and `responsePort` must be defined in your app since an elm library cannot expose ports. They should have types `Serverless.RequestPort` and `Serverless.ResponsePort`, respectively
* `endpoint` is a message through which connections are first received
* `initialModel` is a value to which new connections will set their model
* `update` and `subscriptions` have the usual meaning, but operate on individual connections
aliases.type: { configDecoder : Decoder config, requestPort : RequestPort (Msg msg), responsePort : ResponsePort (Msg msg), endpoint : msg, initialModel : model, update : msg -> Conn config model -> ( Conn config model, Cmd msg ), subscriptions : Conn config model -> Sub msg }

aliases.name: RequestPort
aliases.comment:
Type of port through which the request is received.
Set your request port to this type.

aliases.name: ResponsePort
aliases.comment:
Type of port through which the request is sent.
Set your response port to this type.

values.name: httpApi
values.comment: Create an program for handling HTTP connections.
values.type: HttpApi config model msg -> Program config model msg

name: Serverless.Conn
comment:
An HTTP connection with a request and response

@docs Conn, statusCode, body, send

aliases.name: Conn
aliases.comment:
A connection with a request and response.

Connections are parameterized with config and model record types which are
specific to the application. Config is loaded once on app startup, while model
is set to a provided initial value for each incomming request.
aliases.type: { config : config, req : Request, resp : Response, model : model }

values.name: body
values.type: Body -> Conn config model -> Conn config model

values.name: send
values.comment: Sends a connection response through the given port
values.type: (Value -> Cmd msg) -> Conn config model -> ( Conn config model, Cmd msg )

values.name: statusCode
values.comment: Set the response HTTP status code
values.type: StatusCode -> Conn config model -> Conn config model

name: Serverless.Conn.Request
comment:
Defines an HTTP request.

@docs Id, Method, Request

aliases.name: Request
aliases.type: { id : Id, method : Method, path : String, stage : String }

name: Serverless.Conn.Response
comment:
Types to help send an HTTP response.

@docs Body, Response, StatusCode
